name: WarPlane
description: War Plane is an exciting action game where you control a warship and plunge into fierce battles with the enemy. Dodge fire, attack precisely, and destroy waves of enemies to gain control of the skies. The game is fast-paced, easy to play, yet full of drama, suitable for those who love the feeling of continuous combat and challenging reflexes.
instructions: Use arrow button to move R to Dash Space to Shoot
